message:
refactor(freeze): Remove all TODOs and clean up codebase

- Mark closure var_ref opcodes (1/2/3) as never_freeze to prevent
  incorrect codegen for true closure access
- Replace stack_op TODO fallback with compile error for safety
- Clarify module parsing docs (comptime not implemented, runtime works)
- Remove unused codegen_v2.zig (legacy, superseded by codegen_ssa)
- Remove backup file codegen_ssa.zig.backup
- Use @compileError for unhandled stack ops instead of TODO comment

All closure variable access opcodes except get_var_ref0 (used for
self-recursion) are now marked never_freeze, ensuring functions
with true closures won't be incorrectly frozen.
